statement: Rational KAN forward/backward passes in HZ rational arithmetic match a fractions.Fraction oracle bit-identically on >=1000 paired samples, are bit-reproducible across runs and hardware at fixed seed, and show 95% CI lower bound >1.0 speedup of HZ+P-stack inference over dense HZ at KAN degree>=8 and >=10 hidden units.

n_8c57d2b2.content: Prove: Rational KAN forward/backward passes in HZ rational arithmetic match a fractions.Fraction oracle bit-identically on >=1000 paired samples, are bit-reproducible across runs and hardware at fixed seed, and show 95% CI lower bound >1.0 speedup of HZ+P-stack inference over dense HZ at KAN degree>=8 and >=10 hidden units.

n_8c57d2b2.outcome_reason: All project phases R, 0, 1, 2, 3, and 4 accepted with executable artifacts and gates; see artifacts/rational_kan_hz/iter_1/RATIONAL_KAN_HZ_BOUNDARY_REPORT.md

n_7f4bdfd6.content: Phase 0: Reconstruct Rational KAN baseline (degree 3, 10 hidden units) in projects/rational_kan_hz/; train on f(x)=x[0]^2+sin(x[1]) to MSE<=0.1 over 1000 epochs; deliverable rkan_baseline.py + BASELINE_RECOVERY.md
n_7f4bdfd6.goal_before: Rational KAN forward/backward passes in HZ rational arithmetic match a fractions.Fraction oracle bit-identically on >=1000 paired samples, are bit-reproducible across runs and hardware at fixed seed, and show 95% CI lower bound >1.0 speedup of HZ+P-stack inference over dense HZ at KAN degree>=8 and >=10 hidden units.
n_7f4bdfd6.outcome_reason: Phase 0 baseline trained at degree 3 with 10 inner edges for 1000 epochs, seed=42; final_mse=0.0380944964981 <= 0.1; target_fn_source_hash=d328b8f1b771866f67c2894620557b71a54576c7466200520cc3392501a7b810

n_1c5a242c.content: Phase 1: HZ rational inference port via pyo3 binding over FlatHybridNumber; define HZRational = (num_HZ, den_HZ); RationalFunctionLayerHZ.forward in exact rational; gate: HZ vs fractions.Fraction bit-identity on >=1000 paired samples; deliverable rkan_hz_inference.py + hz_pyo3 crate
n_1c5a242c.goal_before: Rational KAN forward/backward passes in HZ rational arithmetic match a fractions.Fraction oracle bit-identically on >=1000 paired samples, are bit-reproducible across runs and hardware at fixed seed, and show 95% CI lower bound >1.0 speedup of HZ+P-stack inference over dense HZ at KAN degree>=8 and >=10 hidden units.
n_1c5a242c.outcome_reason: Phase 1 Boundary forward pass matched independent Fraction oracle on 1000/1000 paired samples; non_dyadic_fraction=0.998; reduce_step_events=105000

n_52dcfcde.content: Phase 2: HZ SGD training loop with exact rational gradients; bit-reproducibility across runs at fixed seed; cross-hardware bit-identity if two hosts available; convergence within 1.5x of FP baseline at fixed epochs; deliverable rkan_hz_training.py
n_52dcfcde.goal_before: Rational KAN forward/backward passes in HZ rational arithmetic match a fractions.Fraction oracle bit-identically on >=1000 paired samples, are bit-reproducible across runs and hardware at fixed seed, and show 95% CI lower bound >1.0 speedup of HZ+P-stack inference over dense HZ at KAN degree>=8 and >=10 hidden units.
n_52dcfcde.outcome_reason: Phase 2 exact Boundary training trace passed AD tests, byte reproducibility, convergence ratio 0.14334 <= 1.5, and 3200000 trace records over known rules

n_03632038.content: Phase 3: Full P-stack wiring (P2 lazy add, P4 batch_readout, active-set dispatch, born-sparse construction); Gate A measure KAN coefficient Zeckendorf support distribution; Gate B measure update-to-readout ratio; Gate C hash identity HZ-dense vs HZ-P-stack; Gate D 95% CI lower bound >1.0 speedup over HZ dense at degree>=8 and >=10 hidden layers; deliverable rkan_hz_p_stack.py
n_03632038.goal_before: Rational KAN forward/backward passes in HZ rational arithmetic match a fractions.Fraction oracle bit-identically on >=1000 paired samples, are bit-reproducible across runs and hardware at fixed seed, and show 95% CI lower bound >1.0 speedup of HZ+P-stack inference over dense HZ at KAN degree>=8 and >=10 hidden units.
n_03632038.outcome_reason: Phase 3 P-stack gates A-E plus instrumentation passed; speedup mean=1.22308 with 95CI=[1.22145,1.22451]; hash identity 1000/1000

n_3e6bc4a5.content: Phase R (Research & Design): literature review + design doc BOUNDARY_RKAN_DESIGN.md covering (a) HZRational = (sign, num_HZ, den_HZ) canonical form, (b) per-op Boundary agent taxonomy for RKAN, (c) reverse-mode AD via gradient-agent rewrite rules, (d) weight-update rewrite rules, (e) symbolic extraction via net normalization, (f) confluence strategy. Mandatory gate before Phase 0.
n_3e6bc4a5.goal_before: Rational KAN forward/backward passes in HZ rational arithmetic match a fractions.Fraction oracle bit-identically on >=1000 paired samples, are bit-reproducible across runs and hardware at fixed seed, and show 95% CI lower bound >1.0 speedup of HZ+P-stack inference over dense HZ at KAN degree>=8 and >=10 hidden units.
n_3e6bc4a5.outcome_reason: Phase R design package landed with executable coverage gate; strengthened domain guard, payload algebra, canonical materialization, deterministic schedule, and separated P4 routing invariants

n_012c21b0.content: Phase 4: Symbolic extraction from trained Boundary net. Normalize the net to canonical P(x)/Q(x) per output; emit SymPy expression; gate: sympy_eval(extracted, x) == boundary_reduce(net, x) bit-identically on >=100 fresh test inputs after Fraction conversion. Deliverable: rkan_symbolic_extract.py + phase4_symbolic.json.
n_012c21b0.goal_before: Rational KAN forward/backward passes in HZ rational arithmetic match a fractions.Fraction oracle bit-identically on >=1000 paired samples, are bit-reproducible across runs and hardware at fixed seed, and show 95% CI lower bound >1.0 speedup of HZ+P-stack inference over dense HZ at KAN degree>=8 and >=10 hidden units.
n_012c21b0.outcome_reason: Phase 4 symbolic normalization passed: 10/10 critical pairs closed, 100/100 faithfulness, LaTeX PDF compiled, trace replay residual zero, Lipschitz sanity violations zero
